special_mechanics.name: Vehicle-based Racing
special_mechanics.description: Top-down racing game with miniaturized toy vehicles (powerboats, helicopters, formula one cars, tanks). Physics are vehicle/racing-oriented rather than character platformer physics. Vehicles can shoot other racers in some vehicle types.

special_mechanics.name: Track Boundary Enforcement
special_mechanics.description: Predefined track paths with automatic reset if player leaves the route for too long. Courses feature obstacles like cereal boxes and pencil sharpeners.

special_mechanics.name: Head-to-Head Visibility System
special_mechanics.description: Two-player mode where victory is determined by getting a screen ahead of opponent. Trailing player becomes off-screen, and leading player gains a light point.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data. This is a racing game, not a character action platformer. No jump physics, gravity, or sub-pixel system data exists in available documentation. Physics are vehicle-dynamics focused rather than character movement mechanics. Developer credit found at ROM offset 0x500BA.
